hero_desc: Absolute discretion. Predictive intelligence. If you are looking for a traditional escort service, this page is not for you.
hero_subbtn: By referral or prior qualification only
alert_desc: Our analysts have detected that this modus operandi may return to the high-level corporate sector.
paradigm_desc: It is not a traditional escort service. It is a capsule of preventive intelligence and executive immunity. 95% of CEOs make the mistake of hiring visible armed personnel that does not deter threats, but rather indicates where the high-value target is. We identify and expose the threat days before you leave your house.
levels_desc: A security architecture operating on three undetectable levels to keep your lifestyle intact while we watch from the shadows.
lvl1_desc: Satellite monitoring and cyber-patrolling of your environment, family, and routes. We identify and expose threats before you hit the street.
lvl2_desc: Plainclothes teams that secure destination perimeters (restaurants, meetings, schools) minutes before your arrival.
lvl3_desc: In the event of a crisis, our covert reaction team extracts you in under 3 minutes to a safe zone.
target_desc: This service is not open to the general public. We operate under a strict confidentiality protocol for:
target_footer: To apply, complete the confidential brief below. Our intelligence team will evaluate your profile.
form_success_desc: An intelligence officer will review your profile and contact you within 24 hours.
footer_note: All information provided is protected under an implicit Non-Disclosure Agreement (NDA) and military-grade encryption.
